title: Claude Code crashes on startup after update
body: The app crashes immediately after updating to the latest version. I get a segfault on launch every time after update.

title: Crash on startup after updating claude code
body: After I updated claude code it crashes on startup with a segfault. Happens every launch after update immediately.

title: App crashes after update on launch
body: Updating claude code makes the app crash on startup, segfault immediately after update. Cannot launch the app.

title: Feature request: add support for custom themes
body: Please add support for custom color themes so users can customize the interface appearance and colors freely.

title: Add custom themes support to the interface
body: It would be great to add support for custom themes and color customization for the interface appearance overall.

title: Support custom color themes
body: Users want custom themes support to customize interface colors and appearance. Please add theme customization now.

title: Minor: add a tooltip to the status bar
body: A small tooltip on the status bar would help new users understand the indicators shown there.

title: Improve settings panel layout
body: The settings panel could use better spacing and grouping to make options easier to find quickly.

title: Security regression in token handling
body: A recent code edit reintroduced an authentication weakness in how tokens are stored between sessions.

title: Critical failure in the sync engine
body: Something broke badly in the sync engine and it stops working under heavy load conditions.

title: Editor freezes when opening large files
body: The editor freezes and hangs whenever I open a file that is larger than a few megabytes on disk.

title: Duplicate: add support for custom themes and colors
body: Custom themes support for the interface colors and appearance would be nice. Add theme customization.

title: Old stale request nobody follows
body: This request has gone stale and has not seen any activity or interest for a very long while now.

title: Old bug that was updated recently
body: This bug is still happening for me and several other users even on the newest build available.

title: Very old but very popular bug
body: Many people are affected by this longstanding problem and keep upvoting it every single month here.

title: Ancient ignored issue with no traction
body: Nobody seems to care about this ancient issue and it has never received attention from anyone at all.

title: Add a keyboard shortcut for saving files
body: A configurable keyboard shortcut to save the current file would speed up my everyday editing workflow.

title: Slow performance on very large repositories
body: Indexing takes forever on very large repositories and the whole tool becomes sluggish and unresponsive.

title: Autocomplete suggestions are sometimes irrelevant
body: The autocomplete engine frequently proposes suggestions that have nothing to do with the current context.

title: Documentation for the plugin API is incomplete
body: The plugin API documentation is missing many examples and several endpoints are not described anywhere.

title: Dark mode contrast is too low in the sidebar
body: In dark mode the sidebar text has very low contrast and becomes hard to read for many people.

title: Allow disabling telemetry from the config file
body: There should be a straightforward option in the config file to completely disable all telemetry collection.

title: Terminal colors are wrong under tmux
body: When running inside tmux the terminal colors are rendered incorrectly and some escape codes leak through.

title: Add export to markdown for chat transcripts
body: It would help to export chat transcripts directly to a markdown file for sharing and archiving later.

title: Git integration fails on worktrees
body: The git integration cannot detect the current branch when the repository uses linked worktrees at all.

title: Provide an offline installation package
body: An offline installation package would let teams install the tool on machines without any internet access.

title: This row should be skipped because it is a pull request
body: PR body here.

title: Malformed row missing number
body: no number here

title: Malformed row missing created_at
body: no created_at
